title: pyrus nummularia
intro: Pyrus nummularia, also known as the silver bush or silver pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pyrus nummularia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Pyrus nummularia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and other herbal preparations.
